summary.en: Columbus Crew vs Minnesota United FC: contextual analysis using historical and available data. Columbus Crew: 0-0-1 across the last 1. Minnesota United FC: 1-2-2 across the last 5. Recent form gives a slight edge to the away side. The historical layer was based on 12112 available match records. Table context: Columbus Crew=relegation, Minnesota United FC=europe. Absences: Columbus Crew=severe, Minnesota United FC=severe. Lineup context: Columbus Crew=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced; Minnesota United FC=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced. Team news context is available in the enriched snapshot. Lineup context is available in the enriched snapshot. Travel context is available from the local geo substrate. A long domestic trip is recorded for the away side.
